Fixed terminal rendering bug: lines disappearing when text exceeds viewport. Root cause: term.open() was called on a hidden wrapper (display:none), so xterm.js measured 0 font/cell dimensions, causing wrong row count. Fix: (1) wrapper made visible before term.open() by setting active class immediately, (2) removed .xterm position:absolute override that conflicted with xterm.js internal viewport layout, replaced with height:100%, (3) replaced setTimeout timing hacks with requestAnimationFrame, (4) removed forced scrollToBottom on every PTY output chunk.

Fixed terminal scrolling bug (content sinks off-screen instead of scrolling). Root cause: Tauri CSP (script-src 'self'; style-src 'self') silently blocked xterm.js and xterm.css CDN loads from cdn.jsdelivr.net. Without xterm.css, .xterm-viewport had no position:absolute/top:0/bottom:0 constraints, so it grew infinitely. Fix: downloaded xterm.min.js (283KB), xterm.css (5KB), xterm-addon-fit.min.js (2KB) into adt-console/src/vendor/ and updated index.html to use local paths. CSP now allows them as 'self' resources.

POSTMORTEM: Terminal scrolling bug (content sinks off-screen). SYMPTOM: Terminal fills correctly top-to-bottom. Once vertical space is full, instead of scrolling, entire content block moves DOWN line-by-line until all text exits through the bottom, leaving black screen. ROOT CAUSE: Tauri CSP in tauri.conf.json (line 32) sets script-src and style-src to 'self' only. xterm.js (v5) and xterm.css were loaded from cdn.jsdelivr.net -- silently blocked by CSP. Without xterm.css, the .xterm-viewport element (which needs position:absolute; top:0; bottom:0 from xterm.css) defaults to position:static with auto height, so it grows infinitely instead of constraining to the .xterm parent. xterm.js internal scrolling depends on .xterm-viewport being height-constrained. WHY SILENT: CSP violations only appear in browser devtools console (not visible in Tauri unless devtools opened). No JS error thrown -- xterm.js was also blocked, so no terminal functionality at all in strict CSP. In some builds it partially worked from browser cache. FIX: Downloaded xterm.min.js, xterm.css, xterm-addon-fit.min.js into adt-console/src/vendor/. Updated index.html to reference vendor/ paths instead of CDN. Files are now embedded in Tauri binary via frontendDist and pass CSP as 'self' resources. PREVENTION: Never use CDN links in Tauri apps. All frontend dependencies must be vendored locally in src/vendor/. Tauri CSP 'self' means only files embedded in the app bundle are allowed.
